title: App Provider
description: A context provider to manage application-wide state including direction, theme, and sidebar visibility using cookies.
summary: Provides a React context for directionality (LTR/RTL), theme preferences, and sidebar toggling, integrated with cookie persistence.

`,(0,l.jsx)(n,{name:"app-context",code:`// required global.d.ts\r
"use client";\r
import * as React from "react";\r
import { Cookies, Theme /*UserAgent*/ } from "./types";\r
import { useDirection } from "@/hooks/use-direction";\r
\r
export type CookiesName = \`\${Cookies}\` | (string & {});\r
\r
type DirectedAppValue = {\r
  dir: Direction;\r
  theme: Theme;\r
  isOpenAside: boolean;\r
  // userAgent: UserAgent;\r
  // locale\r
  // mssg: Record<string, MessageFormatElement[]> | Record<string, string>;\r
  // lang: string;\r
};\r
\r
interface AppContext extends DirectedAppValue {\r
  openAside: Booleanish;\r
  setOpenAside: (v: Booleanish) => void;\r
  /** default value = \`30\` (one month) */\r
  setCookie: (name: CookiesName, value: string, days?: number) => void;\r
  toggleDirection: () => void;\r
  setDirection: (dir: Direction) => void;\r
}\r
\r
const ctx = React.createContext<AppContext | undefined>(undefined);\r
\r
export function useApp() {\r
  const _ctx = React.useContext(ctx);\r
  if (!_ctx) throw new Error("main layout must be used within an <AppProvider>");\r
  return _ctx;\r
}\r
\r
interface AppProviderProps extends DirectedAppValue {\r
  children: React.ReactNode;\r
}\r
\r
export function AppProvider(props: AppProviderProps) {\r
  const { children, theme = "system", dir: initialDirection = "ltr", isOpenAside = true, ...others } = props;\r
\r
  const [openAside, setOpenAside] = React.useState<Booleanish>(isOpenAside);\r
\r
  const { dir, ..._direction } = useDirection({ initialDirection });\r
\r
  const setCookie = React.useCallback((name: string, value: string, days = 30) => {\r
    const date = new Date();\r
    date.setTime(date.getTime() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\r
    document.cookie = \`\${name}=\${encodeURIComponent(value)};expires=\${date.toUTCString()};path=/\`;\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  const contextValue = React.useMemo<AppContext>(\r
    () => ({\r
      theme,\r
      dir,\r
      openAside,\r
      setOpenAside,\r
      setCookie,\r
      isOpenAside,\r
      ..._direction,\r
      ...others\r
    }),\r
    [theme, dir, openAside, setOpenAside, isOpenAside, setCookie, _direction, others]\r
  );\r
\r
  return <ctx.Provider value={contextValue}>{children}</ctx.Provider>;\r
}`,ext:".tsx",repo:"web/configuration/app-context.tsx"})]})}function d(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,l.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,l.jsx)(h,{...r})}):h(r)}function S(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return b(w);})();
